original_abstract: Complexes of transition metal clusters are useful model systems in surface chemistry and catalysis. Their structures can be analyzed in the gas phase by infrared action spectroscopies that detect vibrational excitation by means of mass spectrometry.
humanized_abstract: In surface chemistry and catalysis transition metal clusters are of great importance. Complexes of transition metal clusters can be studied through the analysis of their structures in the gas phase by infrared action spectroscopies that utilize the detection of vibrational excited species by mass spectrometry.

document.output: In surface chemistry and catalysis transition metal clusters are of great importance. Complexes of transition metal clusters can be studied through the analysis of their structures in the gas phase by infrared action spectroscopies that utilize the detection of vibrational excited species by mass spectrometry.
